title: Don't use Fable 5 in Claude… do this instead
summary: David Ondrej recommends against using Fable 5 in Claude, suggesting an alternative approach. The video appears focused on best practices for AI-assisted coding workflows.
writeup: David Ondrej argues against using Fable 5 in Claude and presents an alternative approach for AI-assisted coding workflows. The video is framed around best practices, drawing on prompt engineering and the behavior of LLMs. The central takeaway is the recommended substitute and the reasoning for avoiding Fable 5 in that setup.
